assets.name: Reddit travel background 01
assets.caption: A picturesque island church on a serene turquoise lake, surrounded by lush green forests and majestic mountains.

metadata.redditTitle: 4 days in Slovenia completely exceeded my expectations

assets.caption: A secluded beach with turquoise water nestled among lush green cliffs in Oman.

metadata.redditTitle: 3 weeks traveling around Oman, my new favorite country in the world

assets.caption: A vibrantly lit Lawson convenience store stands against the backdrop of Japan's majestic Mount Fuji at dusk.

metadata.redditTitle: Spent 50 days traveling with my Fujifilm

assets.name: Reddit travel background 04
assets.caption: A lone boat rests on a tranquil fjord with purple flowers in the foreground and majestic mountains.

metadata.redditTitle: 8 summer days in the Norwegian fjords 🌸🌿⛰️

assets.name: Reddit travel background 05
assets.caption: A vibrant Japanese maple tree with fiery red foliage, overlooking a serene pond and lush green landscape.

metadata.redditTitle: Oregon and California

assets.caption: A vibrant flower bed frames a serene Swiss lake with majestic mountains in the background under a clear sky.

metadata.redditTitle: Switzerland is breathtaking 🌺 🏔️

assets.name: Reddit travel background 07
assets.caption: A moss-covered stone path winds through a vibrant Japanese garden, blanketed in brilliant scarlet autumn leaves.

metadata.redditTitle: Japan in fall 🍁⛩️🚴‍♀️

assets.name: Reddit travel background 08
assets.caption: Snow-covered village nestled in the Swiss Alps, with the majestic Matterhorn looming under twilight.

metadata.redditTitle: Switzerland was expensive, but annoyingly beautiful

assets.name: Reddit travel background 09
assets.caption: Mount Taranaki's majestic reflection in the calm waters at twilight, New Zealand.

metadata.redditTitle: 4.5 months in New Zealand

assets.name: Reddit travel background 10
assets.caption: Waves crashing on a rocky shore with the majestic Mount Fuji visible in the distance at sunset.

metadata.redditTitle: 2 weeks in Japan

assets.caption: An aerial view of the Chicago skyline, with skyscrapers stretching to the horizon and Lake Michigan in the distance.

metadata.redditTitle: First time in Chicago - might be my new favorite US city.

assets.name: Reddit travel background 12
assets.caption: The Lofoten Islands, Norway, with dramatic snow-capped mountains overlooking charming villages and tranquil waters.

metadata.redditTitle: Lofoten Islands, Norway - 2 weeks trip and only 1.5 good day

assets.name: Reddit travel background 13
assets.caption: A Japanese fishing village endures a wintry day, with snow-covered boats docked by traditional homes.

metadata.redditTitle: Spent a day in a Japanese fishing village and loved every second of it.

assets.name: Reddit travel background 14
assets.caption: A sunset view of colorful houses perched on a cliffside overlooking the Ligurian Sea in Cinque Terre, Italy.

metadata.redditTitle: First time in Cinque Terre and there's nothing quite like it.

assets.caption: Indoor botanical garden with lush greenery, a tiled blue fountain, and a glass ceiling.

metadata.redditTitle: Ever had a trip you loved… but the people you went with hated it? That was my 2-week trip in Washington, DC.

assets.caption: Vibrant fall colors carpet the mountainsides in Japan, with red bridges spanning a clear river.

metadata.redditTitle: Fall colors in Japan

assets.name: Reddit travel background 17
assets.caption: Vibrant aurora borealis illuminate the night sky above a silhouetted landscape, a truly mesmerizing natural display.

metadata.redditTitle: Alaska, US was simply mindblowing

assets.caption: A picturesque harbor in Bergen, Norway, with colorful houses nestled against dramatic mountainsides.

metadata.redditTitle: Bergen, Norway is Criminally Underrated!

assets.name: Reddit travel background 19
assets.caption: A stunning view of the rugged coastline and clear blue waters of Japan under a bright sky.

metadata.redditTitle: 3 weeks Japan off the beaten track by folding bycicle and public transport
